case_number: criminal acquittal appeal is dismissed in non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Acquittal Appeal No.D- 34 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No 9844/2017 2. For orders on office objections 3. For order on MA No 9845/2017 4. For katcha Peshi 31.01.2018. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari A.P.G. -=-=- This Criminal Acquittal Appeal is called for hearing. This is second call, neither appellant nor his counsel is present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz.02.1.2018. Since none is present on behalf of the appellant, this criminal acquittal appeal is dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
